title: CatBoost correction weight 0.03
summary: Set the CatBoost correction weight to 0.03 against the RealMLP core.
rationale: The current best parent is 001199 with CV 0.9544491320 and public 0.95409. This hypothesis is an atomic child patch intended to exploit the confirmed two-seed RealMLP core plus low-weight CatBoost correction direction.
implementation_hint: Start from 001199. Keep the RealMLP core and CatBoost expert construction unchanged, but set final = 0.97 * realmlp_core + 0.03 * catboost_pred. Do not tune the weight dynamically.
expected_effect: Test a very conservative CatBoost contribution that may preserve public stability.
risk: Weight 0.03 may be too small to capture the CatBoost signal.
